Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.type

Interface IAbilityTeleport

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction
    public interface IAbilityTeleport
extends IAbility
    API interface for Teleport abilities. Instant repositioning with various modes.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods

    • Method Detail

      • getMode

        int getMode()
        Returns:
        Teleport mode ordinal (0=BLINK, 1=BEHIND, 2=SINGLE).

      • setMode

        void setMode​(int mode)
        Parameters:
        mode - Teleport mode ordinal (0=BLINK, 1=BEHIND, 2=SINGLE).

      • getBlinkCount

        int getBlinkCount()
        Returns:
        Number of rapid blink teleports in BLINK mode.

      • setBlinkCount

        void setBlinkCount​(int count)
        Parameters:
        count - Number of blink teleports.

      • getBlinkDelayTicks

        int getBlinkDelayTicks()
        Returns:
        Delay in ticks between blink teleports.

      • setBlinkDelayTicks

        void setBlinkDelayTicks​(int ticks)
        Parameters:
        ticks - Delay in ticks between blinks.

      • getBlinkRadius

        float getBlinkRadius()
        Returns:
        Maximum random offset radius for blink teleports in blocks.

      • setBlinkRadius

        void setBlinkRadius​(float radius)
        Parameters:
        radius - Blink offset radius in blocks.

      • getBehindDistance

        float getBehindDistance()
        Returns:
        Distance behind the target to teleport to in BEHIND mode.

      • setBehindDistance

        void setBehindDistance​(float distance)
        Parameters:
        distance - Behind-target distance in blocks.

      • isRequireLineOfSight

        boolean isRequireLineOfSight()
        Returns:
        Whether the teleport requires clear line of sight to the destination.

      • setRequireLineOfSight

        void setRequireLineOfSight​(boolean require)
        Parameters:
        require - Whether line of sight is required.

      • isDamageAtStart

        boolean isDamageAtStart()
        Returns:
        Whether damage is dealt at the departure location.

      • setDamageAtStart

        void setDamageAtStart​(boolean damage)
        Parameters:
        damage - Whether to deal damage at departure.

      • isDamageAtEnd

        boolean isDamageAtEnd()
        Returns:
        Whether damage is dealt at the arrival location.

      • setDamageAtEnd

        void setDamageAtEnd​(boolean damage)
        Parameters:
        damage - Whether to deal damage at arrival.

      • getDamage

        float getDamage()
        Returns:
        Damage dealt at teleport locations.

      • setDamage

        void setDamage​(float damage)
        Parameters:
        damage - Teleport damage amount.

      • getDamageRadius

        float getDamageRadius()
        Returns:
        Radius of the damage area at teleport locations in blocks.

      • setDamageRadius

        void setDamageRadius​(float radius)
        Parameters:
        radius - Damage area radius in blocks.
